title: PURSUE N170 Face Perception
description: This dataset comprises event-related potential (ERP) recordings from a face perception task conducted as part of the PURSUE project. EEG data were collected from participants at three undergraduate institutions across the United States (2017-2018) using a standardized N170 face perception paradigm. The dataset is part of the ERP CORE initiative, providing an open resource for human event-related potential research with detailed task specifications and demographic information.
methods_description: EEG data were collected from participants at three primarily undergraduate academic institutions located in Southern California, Massachusetts, and Virginia during a face perception task conducted in 2017-2018. The task design follows the ERP CORE protocol as described in Kappenman et al. (2021). Detailed methodology and task parameters are provided in the supplementary materials of the ERP CORE publication.
